name: Wheaten Bread (Maddybenny, Irish)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the whole wheat flour, all-purpose flour, baking soda, salt, and nutmeg.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients; add buttermilk and orange rind.
3. Mix just until the dough is soft but not sticky. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface.
4. Knead the dough 10 times.
5. Place the dough into a greased 8 x 4 inch (1.5 L) loaf pan.
6. Bake in a 350°F (180°C) oven for 20 minutes.
7. Reduce the temperature to 300°F (150°C). Continue baking for 25 to 30 minutes longer, or until a cake tester inserted into the center of the loaf comes out clean.
8. Turn the bread onto a wire rack.
